labels.value: Number of data key rows less than 30 or more than 33.

labels.value: Hisense Argentina,Hisense Australia,Hisense Canada,Hisense Chile,Hisense Colombia,Hisense Dubai,Hisense India,Hisense Indonesia,Hisense International,Hisense Japan,Hisense Malaysia,Hisense Mexico,Hisense Panama,Hisense Peru,Hisense Philippines,Hisense Saudi,Hisense Singapore,Hisense South Africa,Hisense Thailand,Hisense USA,Hisense Vietnam,Hisense West Africa,
You have no sales target to show.
The sample display task of {0} in {1} has remained at your node for more than 24 hours. Please handle it promptly.
This record is locked. If you need to edit it, contact your admin.
Once the task has been approved in the approval process, it cannot be deleted.
It cannot be modified after submission
Task number must be greater than PO number
If the first-level task has not been approved, the third-level task cannot be created!
There is no arrival data for the secondary tasks.
The quantity of tertiary tasks exceeds the number of pods for secondary tasks.
The tertiary tasks of store types cannot be deleted.
The tertiary tasks of store types cannot be modified.
Secondary tasks cannot be created if the primary tasks have not been approved.
'商品展示情报'有必填字段未填写。

已存在该产品请重新添加选择，谢谢

labels.value: SPIV commission data conflicts with existing data. Please check and retry
This node is locked and cannot be processed.

Please click "submit" after confirming that the splitting has been completed. Tasks will be split among various stores in a bottom-up order. lf there are priority stores, please check the box labeled "priority".
The total number of sample machines in the storeis not equal to the number of tasks.Please check it.
Store Sampling Product Layout is update!
If you need to update image, please upload a new image instead of deleting it.
